violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the food prep area noted not smooth easily cleanable.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Paper towels noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the kitchen.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls ceiling and ceiling vents in the food prep area noted in need of cleaning.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single use food containers noted being stored on the floor.
